mapper.sql: (SELECT CONCAT('/uploads/images/', a.name) FROM attach a WHERE a.target = 'profile' AND a.target_id = m.id LIMIT 1) AS authorProfileImageUrl
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_comment c WHERE c.post_id = p.id) AS commentCount
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO post_bookmark (member_id, post_id) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{postId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_bookmark WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, CASE WHEN p.deleted_at IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE p.title END AS title, COALESCE(m.nickname, '탈퇴한 사용자') AS authorNickname, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, , p.created_at AS createdAt, false AS liked, (p.deleted_at IS NOT NULL) AS deleted,
FROM post_bookmark pb JOIN post p ON p.id = pb.post_id LEFT JOIN member m ON m.id = p.member_id WHERE pb.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY pb.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_bookmark WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
